summary: Iteration 6 — Frontend regression tests for 3 reported bug fixes: (1) WordSearch grid stability during drag, (2) Activity modal not closing on drag-out, (3) SpotDifference responsive layout. Plus regression checks on StickerBeach, Maze, and mobile modal sizing. 25/25 functional checks passed across PC (1280x900), Tablet (768x1024), and Mobile (390x844) viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG #1 FIX VERIFIED — WordSearch.jsx L46: useMemo dep is now level?.words (stable primitive ref via memoised parent). Snapshot of all 144 cells before/after a 6-cell drag (cell-0-0 → cell-0-5) is IDENTICAL on PC, Tablet, and Mobile viewports. touchAction:none confirmed on grid container so mobile drag won't scroll the page.

BUG #2 FIX VERIFIED — Activities.jsx L116-124: armed-flag onMouseDown/onMouseUp pattern works. Verified three scenarios in WordSearch modal: (a) drag that ENDS inside grid → modal stays open ✓, (b) drag that STARTS inside grid and ENDS on backdrop → modal stays open ✓ (this was the user-reported regression), (c) plain mousedown+mouseup directly on backdrop with no drag → modal closes ✓.

BUG #3 FIX VERIFIED — SpotDifference.jsx: md:grid-cols-2 + preserveAspectRatio='xMidYMid meet' confirmed. Image-B bbox aspect ratio = 1.50 (3:2) on ALL three viewports. Side-by-side on PC (a.x=220 / b.x=650) and Tablet 768 (a.x=52 / b.x=394). Stacked on Mobile 390 (both at x=32). Cloud diff at cx=180,cy=80 correctly registers a click on the right-hand SVG at every viewport (sd-found-cloud element appears).

REGRESSIONS — StickerBeach drag-to-move works on PC and Mobile without closing the parent modal (touch-action:none + stopPropagation on inner card). Maze keyboard ArrowRight/ArrowDown moves the player (verified DOM position delta). 'New maze' button clickable. Mobile maze arrow buttons present via aria-label (data-testid='maze-arrow-*' not used but functionality intact — main agent may optionally add testids for consistency).

MOBILE LAYOUT — All 8 activity tiles fit at 390x844 (grid-cols-2). Modal inner card max-h-[92vh] (503px of 844 viewport) with overflow-y:auto. LevelHeader pickers wrap properly. No horizontal overflow observed.
MINOR NIT — The 'Tap differences here' label text is rendered in CSS uppercase; this is a display style, not a content issue. Visible in screenshots.

CONSOLE — Multiple 401s in console come from polling endpoints that require auth (admin status); not related to these bug fixes and present in prior iterations. No JS exceptions, no audio errors during tile pop sound, no React warnings.
test_credentials: n/a — frontend-only run, no auth required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three reported bugs are verified fixed. Test harness uses mouse drag to simulate touch (Playwright touch emulation limitation noted). For WordSearch stability the canonical assertion is: snapshot textContent of all [data-testid^='ws-cell-'] before/after drag — must be deep-equal. For modal close logic the armed-flag is set on backdrop mousedown only if e.target === e.currentTarget; resetting after mouseup. Useful selectors: [data-testid='activity-modal'] (the backdrop), [data-testid='activity-close'], [data-testid='sd-image-b'], [data-testid='sd-found-<id>'], [data-testid='sticker-stage'], [data-testid^='placed-'].
rca of the issue: N/A — all three bug fixes verified across PC/Tablet/Mobile. No regressions observed in StickerBeach, Maze, or modal sizing.
